app.title: Show HN: State of the Art of Coding Models, According to Hacker News Commenters
app.author: yunusabd
app.description: Show HN: State of the Art of Coding Models, According to Hacker News Commenters
proposed_tests: Test that the model produces the expected output for a series of inputs
Compare the model's performance to a baseline model
Evaluate the model's ability to learn from feedback
